seoTitle: How to Use Airtable for Inventory Management
metaDescription: Build an inventory tracking system in Airtable with a product catalog, linked stock tables, formula-based totals, and low-stock alerts.
intro: Airtable can double as a lightweight inventory management system once you link a product catalog to tables for incoming and outgoing stock and let formula fields calculate your live totals. This guide covers building that structure from scratch and setting up alerts so you know when stock runs low.

steps.heading: Build your core product table
steps.body: Create a product catalog table with essential fields like SKU, price, and image attachments for each item you stock.

steps.heading: Add linked tables for stock movement
steps.body: Create separate 'Incoming Stock' and 'Outgoing Orders' tables and link them to your product table to form a relational structure.

steps.heading: Calculate live stock with Rollup and Formula fields
steps.body: Use Rollup fields to pull totals from your linked tables and Formula fields to compute your real-time active inventory level for each product.

steps.heading: Scan barcodes with the mobile app
steps.body: Use the Airtable mobile app to scan physical barcodes and add stock movements directly into your database on the go.

steps.heading: Set up low-stock alerts
steps.body: Go to the Automations tab and configure an email or Slack alert that triggers when a product's stock level drops below a threshold you define.

steps.heading: Review your inventory dashboard
steps.body: Group products by status in a view to get a quick visual read on what's in stock, low, or out.

faq.question: Can Airtable calculate stock levels automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, by combining Rollup fields with Formula fields you can have Airtable subtract outgoing orders from incoming stock automatically for a live total.

faq.question: Does Airtable support barcode scanning?
faq.answer: Yes, the Airtable mobile app includes a barcode scanner you can use to quickly add or look up records tied to physical products.

faq.question: How do I get notified when stock is low?
faq.answer: Set up an Automation with a trigger condition based on your stock formula field, then connect an email or Slack action to send the alert.

faq.question: Is Airtable good enough for a real inventory system, or just a spreadsheet replacement?
faq.answer: For small to mid-sized operations, Airtable's relational tables and automations can handle real inventory tracking; larger operations may eventually need dedicated inventory software.
